overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage showing a character walking through a dark grassy field at night, holding a torch that illuminates the narrow dirt path. The player moves from a walled path into open grassland and approaches a dense forest edge, with the torch casting dynamic shadows on the tall grass and trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt path alongside stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the path with a stone wall to the right, torch illuminating the ground ahead

entered.detail: tall stone wall running parallel to the path on the right side
narrow winding dirt trail through tall grass
dense shrubbery and small trees on the left side of the path
tall wild grass flanking both sides of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt path at night, bordered by a stone wall on the right and bushes on the left. The torch casts a warm orange light on the path ahead, revealing tall grass swaying in the darkness. The environment is quiet and empty, with no other characters or vehicles present.

events.description: stone wall ends, transitioning into open grassland with wooden fence posts visible
distant forest edge becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: traversing open grassland with torch held in left hand, illuminating the path forward

entered.detail: short wooden posts marking the end of the wall section
dark silhouette of trees visible on the horizon
wooden torch held in left hand casting flickering light

segments.scene_description: The stone wall ends and the landscape opens into wide grassland. The player continues walking with the torch clearly visible in the left hand, casting light on the trail. Wooden fence posts briefly appear on the right before the terrain becomes fully open. In the distance, a dark forest edge becomes visible as the destination ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge path with dense trees

events.description: entering forest edge, trees closing in on both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: walking toward the dark forest, torchlight revealing tree trunks and dense vegetation ahead

entered.detail: tall dark trees forming a dense wall ahead and flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The open field gives way to a forest edge as tall trees loom ahead in the darkness. The torch illuminates individual tree trunks and the narrowing path surrounded by dense vegetation. The sky becomes partially obscured by the forest canopy, creating a more enclosed and ominous atmosphere as the player continues forward into the woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined nocturnal path into the oppressive depths of a dark forest. It begins with a walk along a narrow dirt trail bordered by a stone wall and bushes, where a handheld torch casts a warm orange glow on the swaying grass. As the stone wall ends, the landscape opens into a wide grassland with scattered wooden fence posts before the terrain becomes fully open. The scene then shifts as the open field gives way to a looming forest edge, with the torch illuminating individual tree trunks and dense vegetation. Finally, the path narrows and the sky is obscured by the overhead canopy, creating an enclosed and ominous atmosphere as the camera moves into the woods.
